scope: same-day environment matrix for API1/API2 contract behavior and representative field drift

api1.current_judgment: No environment-specific branch was observed in the 2026-06-19 same-day matrix. Query parameters still dominate API1 behavior.
stable_rules: `tid` and `idlist` remain hard parameters across all four tested request environments.
`appid`/`appkey` remain branch-style validation rather than simple always-required auth.
Single-request `idlist` limit is 32 non-empty items; 33 non-empty items returns `-111001 / idlist个数错误, 为0或超过限制`.
Duplicates count toward the 32-item limit and are not deduplicated.
Empty comma slots are ignored and do not count toward the 32-item limit.
Mixed `invalidcid123,valid` still returns top-level `errorno=0`; the bad item falls to per-item `retcode=10010045`.

cases.result: top-level success, invalid item retcode=10010045, result order stable
-111001 / idlist个数错误, 为0或超过限制

api2.current_judgment: No environment-specific branch was observed in the 2026-06-19 same-day matrix. Query parameters still dominate API2 behavior.
stable_rules: HTTP 200 still does not imply success; success/failure must be judged from `errorno`/`errormsg` in the body.
Only exact lowercase `otype=json` switches API2 into JSONP `QZOutputJson=...;` mode.
Missing `otype` or weird values like `text` still return XML success bodies.
`union_platform` remained ignored in all tested environments.
`appid`/`appkey` validation remained branch-style in all tested environments.
Single-request `idlist` limit is 32 non-empty items; 33 non-empty items returns `-111001 / idlist个数错误, 为0或超过限制`.
Mixed valid+invalid VIDs remain top-level `errorno=0`; the invalid item preserves `id` but leaves `vid/title` empty and still reports per-item `retcode=0`.
Even an all-invalid JSONP batch can stay at top-level `errorno=0`; callers still have to detect failure from empty-shell item fields rather than per-item `retcode`.

cases.result: stable JSONP wrapper QZOutputJson=...; with application/x-javascript
stable XML success body; JSONP switch is case-sensitive
top-level success, invalid item empty shell, result order stable
top-level success, each item is an empty shell, per-item retcode still 0
-111001 / idlist个数错误, 为0或超过限制

same_page_multi_env.current_status: After switching the probe signature from unstable `videos[0]` to a stable selected-row strategy (`URL vid -> video_ids[0] -> deterministic fallback`), all five representative buckets stayed at `unique_signature_count=1` across the four same-day request environments.

representative_samples.field_drift_status: no same-day drift observed in `state / upload_src / publish_date / targetid / cover_list / category_map`
no same-day drift observed in selected-row fields or aggregate counts
same-day multi-header live recheck is now complete and stable
same-day multi-header live recheck is now complete and stable
same-day multi-header live recheck is now complete and stable

open_items: browser-like `sec-ch-ua / sec-fetch-* / cookie` requests were not included in this same-day matrix
each page-shape bucket still needs a second representative page before promoting the result to bucket-wide stability
